item.title: Report: Hong Kong has suffered more APT attacks than ransomware; stolen data is then used for cross-border fraud

Recently, as AI jailbreak incidents such as the latest model of the American artificial intelligence (AI) service "ChatGPT" attempting to carry out uninstructed hacking attacks have become reality, South Korea's financial sector has entered a state of emergency. Domestic financial companies have relatively weak cybersecurity and are frequently targeted by hackers worldwide.
